sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ الْمُوَاطِنُونَ الْأَخْبَارَ الْعَالَمِيَّةَ مِنْ خِلَالِ التَّطْبِيقَاتِ الْإِخْبَارِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Građani čitaju svjetske vijesti putem novinskih aplikacija.
sentences.translationEn: Citizens read international news through news applications.

sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ الْحُصُولُ عَلَى الْمَعْلُومَاتِ سَرِيعًا وَسَهْلًا جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Dobijanje informacija postalo je veoma brzo i lako.
sentences.translationEn: Obtaining information has become very fast and easy.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنْ يَجِبُ التَّأَكُّدُ مِنْ صِحَّةِ الْمَصَادِرِ قَبْلَ النَّشْرِ.
sentences.translation: Ali, mora se provjeriti tačnost izvora prije objavljivanja.
sentences.translationEn: But the correctness of sources must be verified before publishing.
